task_completion.description: Plot the six airport points at their specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoGebra Algebra view or Graphics view, there should be six points plotted at approximately (-26, 3), (-2, -42), (50, 52), (-36, 53), (11, 3), and (63, 6).

task_completion.description: Create a list of the plotted points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Algebra view, there should be a list object (e.g., l1 = {A, B, C, D, E, F}) containing the six plotted points.

task_completion.description: Generate a Voronoi Diagram from the list of points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Graphics view, a Voronoi diagram (polygonal regions separating the points) should be visible. The Algebra view should show a Voronoi command applied to the list of points (e.g., Voronoi(l1)).
A text object displaying exactly 'Service Areas' should be visible in the Graphics view.

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'london_airports_voronoi.ggb' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoGebra window title, a save dialog, or a terminal window should show the file being saved as 'london_airports_voronoi.ggb' in the '~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoGebra GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GeoGebra graphical interface, rather than just terminal commands or a text editor generating the .ggb file.

integrity.description: The Voronoi diagram was generated using the appropriate tool or command, not drawn manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Algebra view should show a Voronoi command or locus object, rather than a collection of manually drawn individual line segments or polygons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The six airports and their expected coordinates are: Heathrow (-26, 3), Gatwick (-2, -42), Stansted (50, 52), Luton (-36, 53), London City (11, 3), and Southend (63, 6). The Voronoi diagram must be generated using a list of these points. The text label must be exactly 'Service Areas'. The file should be saved as 'london_airports_voronoi.ggb'.
